forbidden_scope: runtime behavior or live Harbor fact matching
hosted registry, marketplace, sync, crawler queue, benchmark contract, or true write execution
Core, Harbor, App, or other repositories

integration_evidence.summary: Package-local fixture declares a redacted source summary, normalized output sample, source/evidence placeholder refs, binding requirements, validation ownership boundaries, and forbidden raw/runtime fields.
Manifest marks the GH-95 fixture asset ref as present and records fixture id/version, source shape, and redaction summary.
Lifecycle lock input now includes the fixture asset version and leaves post-check as the remaining planned placeholder.
GH-95 is the primary Loom item; GH-88 is mirrored as the parent FR and is not closed by this PR.

commands.command: jq -e '.asset_refs[] | select(.role == "fixture") | select(.status == "present" and .fixture_id == "example.read-public-page.fixture" and .fixture_version == "0.1.0" and .work_item == "GH-95")' sites/example/read-public-page/manifest.json

jq -e '.fixture_id == "example.read-public-page.fixture" and .normalized_fixture.output_schema == "lode://schema/site-capability/example/read-public-page/output@0.1.0" and (.redaction_policy.forbidden_raw_source_fields | index("cookies")) and (.binding_requirements.normalized_field_sources | length == 4)' sites/example/read-public-page/fixtures/read-public-page.fixture.json

commands.summary: Blocked on embedded suite CLI JSON consumption after direct suite and carrier validations passed.
